query:
SELECT id, name, suppressed, productLane, projectState, priority, stageCode,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contactProjects cp JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId 
   WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.rejectedAt IS NULL) as sr_count
FROM projects p
WHERE id IN ('570022', '720037');
command:

   WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.rejectedAt IS NULL) as sr_count
